rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for implementation contracts must be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference ports in valid component type scopes
Avoid using subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without proper variable representation
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
Place guarantee statements only in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without valid variable representation
